error_map.hint: spotlercrm API key is missing or invalid; re-run pm credentials add spotlercrm
spotlercrm account lacks access for this request
spotlercrm rate limit exceeded; the connector will retry with backoff

conformance.reason: this stream's real endpoint lives on the CRM API v4 host (https://apiv4.reallysimplesystems.com), a different host entirely from the bundle's base.url (the legacy-parity contacts/accounts/opportunities/tasks streams' https://api.spotlercrm.com/api/v1); the engine resolves an http(s)-prefixed stream.path as an ALREADY-ABSOLUTE request target (connsdk.Requester.resolveURL) and never substitutes the conformance replay server's origin for it, so a declarative fixture replay would dial the real internet instead of the test double — the same shape as defillama's stablecoins stream and squarespace's contacts stream. Read correctness for this stream is proven by its own fixtures/streams/activities/page_1.json shape (matches the CRM API v4's real documented {metadata,list:[{metadata,record}]} envelope, confirmed from the API's own rendered GET /accounts example) and by the same schema-projection/computed_fields path every other stream uses; only the dynamic (live-replay) checks are skipped, not the static schema/fixture-shape checks.

this stream's real endpoint lives on the CRM API v4 host (https://apiv4.reallysimplesystems.com), a different host entirely from the bundle's base.url; see the activities stream's identical conformance marker for the full explanation.
